title: OECD Household Indicators Dashboard — Country View (disposable income, debt, savings, net worth)
source_org: OECD (Statistics and Data Directorate, National Accounts Division)
time_coverage: varies by series, mostly ~1995/2007–2026 Q1/Q2, quarterly and annual
units: index, national currency, percent, and ratios — described per-row in MEASURE/UNIT_MEASURE columns
license_terms: OECD Terms and Conditions — free reuse with attribution
notes: SDMX dataflow OECD.SDD.NAD:DSD_HHDASH@DF_HHDASH_CTRY(1.0), 'Household indicators dashboard – country view'. This is OECD's household financial-well-being dashboard: real GDP per capita, real/gross household disposable income per capita, household net saving/savings rate, household debt (LES1M_FD4, gross debt of households and NPISH), net financial worth, financial assets composition, consumer confidence, unemployment. No single dedicated 'household debt-to-income ratio' MEASURE code exists in this dataflow's codelist (CL_MEASURE_NA_DASH) — debt (LES1M_FD4) and disposable income (B6GS1M_POP etc.) are both present as separate series so the ratio can be derived downstream. No country/measure sub-filter applied beyond REF_AREA — full dashboard breadth kept since task scope was 'financial dashboard indicators' broadly. Key used: '.{REF_AREA}..' i.e. FREQ and MEASURE/UNIT_MEASURE left unfiltered.
